project.title: Proteogenomics of Gammarus fossarum ovaries
project.projectDescription: This project contributes to the description of the core-proteome of female reproductive tissues from crustacean amphipods.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Protein samples were loaded on a SDS-PAGE for a short migration, excised from a  single polyacrylamide band, digested by trypsin, and the resulting peptides were analyzed by LTQ-Orbitrap XL tandem mass spectrometry.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: MS/MS spectra were analyzed by MASCOT, the results were then parsed with IRMA, spectral counts were compared with PatternLab.
keywords: Shotgun proteomics; yolk proteins; female reproductive organ; conserved proteins

references.referenceLine: Trapp J, Almunia C, Gaillard JC, Pible O, Chaumot A, Geffard O, Armengaud J. Data for comparative proteomics of ovaries from five non-model, crustacean amphipods. Data Brief. 2015 Aug 12;5:1-6. eCollection 2015 Dec

Characteristics[NumberOfBiologicalReplic: For each species, five biological replicates were performed.
Comment[AcquisitionMethod]: data-dependent mode using the TOP3 strategy.
Comment[FlowRateChromatogram]: at a flow rate of 0.3 µL/min
Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance]: mass tolerances of 5 ppm on the parent ion
